name: Ahsuite
highlight_text: Category: Client portal software for freelancers
description:
What Ahsuite does

Ahsuite is a white label client portal  that assists creatives in their work with clients. The line of tools allow for easy feature customization to suit a freelancer’s branding needs.

With Ahsuite’s custom features, users can infuse a high level of professionalism into their work, improve productivity, and elevate client satisfaction.

Source: Ahsuite

Key benefits of Ahsuite 

  • Project management tool for a clear view of projects and tasks.
  • Display dashboards for sharing presentations, task project status, performance metrics, etc.
  • Integration with other project management tools.

Benefits of Using Ahsuite

  • The centralized nature of the platform eases your communication with team members and clients.
  • It allows you to showcase your skills and portfolio like a pro. 
  • It eliminates the need for frequent client support because there is a step-by-step breakdown of the work done for the client.
  • It saves freelancers a lot of time and allows them to focus on other demanding aspects of the job.

Pricing 

  • Free plan
  • Grow plan at $6.5/month
  • Professional plan at $14/month
  • Agency plan at $24/month

Pros

✅Effective complaint resolution process

✅Password request options for privacy.

Cons

🚫Steep learning curve

🚫Their customer support may not always be available.

🚫It has low scalability as compared to the others.
